[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / overlay

# Accessor: overlay

## Get Signature

```ts
get overlay(): 
  | TextmodeImage
  | undefined;
```

Overlay source image for the target canvas or video, when overlay mode is enabled.

### Returns

  \| [`TextmodeImage`](../../../namespaces/media/classes/TextmodeImage.md)
  \| `undefined`

### Example
